scripts/append-today-brief.ps1.brief: Daily brief auto-generation script (fixed path normalization)
scripts/append-today-brief.ps1.purpose: Generates date-suffixed daily brief on Claude Code stop, with per-file change explanations, function details, and next actions

functions.name: Main pipeline
functions.description: Read today-session-context.json -> parse transcript for file changes -> try git diff -> compile Markdown -> write daily-briefs/claude-code-today-brief-YYYYMMDD.md

functions.name: SessionContext reader
functions.description: Load Claude per-file change details (purpose/detail/functions) from JSON

functions.name: Transcript parser
functions.description: Regex-match CREATE/MODIFY FILE markers from transcript, normalize backslash to forward slash

functions.name: GitDiff enhancer
functions.description: Run git diff --name-status HEAD for extra file status info

functions.name: Markdown compiler
functions.description: Assemble sections: Completed Tasks -> File Changes per-file -> Leftovers -> Next Actions

functions.name: IdempotentAppend
functions.description: Detect if same session block already written, skip duplicates

scripts/append-today-brief.ps1.detail: Rewrote existing script. Key changes: (1) Output moved to D:/EWM ROBOT/daily-briefs/ (project-adjacent, not inside project) (2) Added context JSON read for structured per-file detail (3) Each file gets independent section with purpose/detail/functions (4) Leftovers + Next Actions sections (5) Idempotent write avoids duplicate blocks (6) Path normalization backslash to forward slash

.claude/settings.json.brief: Stop hook includes append-today-brief.ps1 (3rd in chain)
.claude/settings.json.purpose: Auto-trigger daily brief generation on every Claude Code Stop event

functions.name: Stop hook
functions.description: Third item in Stop hook list, timeout 15s, shows statusMessage

.claude/settings.json.detail: Added append-today-brief.ps1 as third Stop hook. Chain: transcript-logger -> update-session-status -> append-today-brief

.claude/settings.local.json.purpose: Skip permission prompts for read/write/edit tools to speed up workflow
.claude/settings.local.json.detail: Local user config excluded from git. All core file tools set to auto-allow

.claude/today-session-context.json.brief: Session context staging file written by Claude during session
.claude/today-session-context.json.purpose: Accumulates structured change details during session for the brief script to consume on Stop
.claude/today-session-context.json.detail: Contains files (per-file action/brief/purpose/functions/detail), requests (completed tasks), leftovers, nextActions. Maintained by Claude via Write tool. Uses forward-slash paths

.claude/memory/auto-daily-brief.md.brief: Memory file documenting the auto daily brief mechanism
.claude/memory/auto-daily-brief.md.purpose: Persist mechanism docs across sessions for Claude to remember how it works
.claude/memory/auto-daily-brief.md.detail: Documents: (1) Claude writes context JSON during session (2) append-today-brief.ps1 runs on Stop to compile daily brief

.claude/memory/MEMORY.md.brief: Added auto-daily-brief pointer to memory index
.claude/memory/MEMORY.md.purpose: Register new memory file in session-load index
.claude/memory/MEMORY.md.detail: Appended one-line pointer linking to auto-daily-brief.md

requests.title: Create auto daily brief mechanism
requests.detail: Built complete auto daily brief: append-today-brief.ps1 + context JSON + Stop hook. Script reads per-file purpose/detail/functions, transcript changes, git diff

requests.title: Fix path normalization in brief script
requests.detail: Backslash vs forward slash mismatch caused context lookup failures

requests.title: Configure permission auto-allow
requests.detail: Created settings.local.json with allowAuto:true for all core tools

requests.title: Move daily brief output to project-adjacent folder
requests.detail: Output path changed from docs/ to D:/EWM ROBOT/daily-briefs/ to keep project clean

nextActions: Verify Stop hook works on next session
Future sessions: update context JSON during session for richer briefs
